{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Front Desk Officer",
  "description": "JOJE Hospital, Abuja is one of the fastest growing medical facility located in the city of Abuja, committed to providing excellent and first class medical services to it&rsquo;s clients at an affordable price. Specialist Hospital with speciality in IVF, Pediatrics, NICU, and render Pharmacatical and Laboratory services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Officer

Job Location: Gudu, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Greet and welcome clients in a friendly and professional manner.
	Answer and direct phone calls to appropriate individuals.
	Schedule appointments and meetings.
	Recieve, sort, and distribute mail and deliveries.
	Maintain a clean and organised reception area.
	Assist with administrative tasks.


Salary
N100,000 - N120,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hrjojehospital@yahoo.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Front Desk Officer Job at JOJE Hospital




        
    

        
        JOJE Hospital, Abuja is one of the fastest growing medical facility located in the city of Abuja, committed to providing excellent and first class medical services to it’s clients at an affordable price. Specialist Hospital with speciality in IVF, Pediatrics, NICU, and render Pharmacatical and Laboratory services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Officer

Job Location: Gudu, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Greet and welcome clients in a friendly and professional manner.
	Answer and direct phone calls to appropriate individuals.
	Schedule appointments and meetings.
	Recieve, sort, and distribute mail and deliveries.
	Maintain a clean and organised reception area.
	Assist with administrative tasks.


Salary
N100,000 - N120,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Logistics Officer is responsible for overseeing the movement, distribution, and storage of goods, ensuring efficiency, compliance, and cost-effectiveness in supply chain operations.


Requirements

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Administrative Officer",
  "description": "Chelis Bookazine Limited is Nigeria&rsquo;s leading educational supplier, supplying top quality international educational books, resources and services to Nigeria&rsquo;s education industry. Chelis has completely revolutionized the school supply industry in Nigeria because of the passion, creativity, total commitment and dedication we bring into our business to achieve our vision of contributing significantly to the provision of top quality, world class education in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Officer

Job Location: Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Chelis Group is seeking a highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive Administrative Officer to join our growing team at the Head Office in Surulere, Lagos State.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for supporting the day-to-day administrative and financial operations of Chelis Group and its sister companies, ensuring efficiency, accuracy, compliance, and the smooth running of office activities.
	The ideal candidate should possess strong administrative, organizational, and record-management skills, with the ability to multitask effectively in a fast-paced environment.
	The role involves managing administrative processes, supporting financial transactions, maintaining records, and ensuring compliance with company policies and relevant regulations.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage general office operations, supplies, correspondence, and filing systems.
	Support basic accounting functions, including invoicing, expense tracking, and petty cash management.
	Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial and administrative records.
	Prepare reports, presentations, and other business documentation as required.
	Coordinate schedules, meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.
	Liaise with vendors, service providers, and external partners to ensure office needs are met efficiently.
	Assist in monitoring compliance with internal policies, procedures, and regulatory requirements.
	Drive on official assignments when required.
	Perform other duties as assigned to support the smooth operation of the office.


Requirements


	B.Sc./HND in Business Administration, Accounting, or a related field.
	Minimum of two (2) years post-NYSC work experience in administrative and accounting roles.
	Proficiency in accounting software and the Microsoft Office Suite.
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy in financial data management.
	Excellent organizational, time-management, and multitasking skills.
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.
	Valid driver&#39;s license with practical driving experience.
	Residence within close proximity or reasonable commuting distance to Bode Thomas, Surulere, Lagos State will be an added advantage.
	Willingness to work two (2) Saturdays per month.


Salary
N120,000 - N150,000 monthly

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to: chelisrecruitment@gmail.com using &quot;Administrative Officer &ndash; Surulere&quot; as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-06-02",
  "validThrough": "2026-07-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Chelis Bookazine Limited"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",

Administrative Officer Job at Chelis Bookazine Limited




        
    

        
        Chelis Bookazine Limited is Nigeria’s leading educational supplier, supplying top quality international educational books, resources and services to Nigeria’s education industry. Chelis has completely revolutionized the school supply industry in Nigeria because of the passion, creativity, total commitment and dedication we bring into our business to achieve our vision of contributing significantly to the provision of top quality, world class education in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Officer

Job Location: Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Chelis Group is seeking a highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive Administrative Officer to join our growing team at the Head Office in Surulere, Lagos State.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for supporting the day-to-day administrative and financial operations of Chelis Group and its sister companies, ensuring efficiency, accuracy, compliance, and the smooth running of office activities.
	The ideal candidate should possess strong administrative, organizational, and record-management skills, with the ability to multitask effectively in a fast-paced environment.
	The role involves managing administrative processes, supporting financial transactions, maintaining records, and ensuring compliance with company policies and relevant regulations.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage general office operations, supplies, correspondence, and filing systems.
	Support basic accounting functions, including invoicing, expense tracking, and petty cash management.
	Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial and administrative records.
	Prepare reports, presentations, and other business documentation as required.
	Coordinate schedules, meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.
	Liaise with vendors, service providers, and external partners to ensure office needs are met efficiently.
	Assist in monitoring compliance with internal policies, procedures, and regulatory requirements.
	Drive on official assignments when required.
	Perform other duties as assigned to support the smooth operation of the office.


Requirements


	B.Sc./HND in Business Administration, Accounting, or a related field.
	Minimum of two (2) years post-NYSC work experience in administrative and accounting roles.
	Proficiency in accounting software and the Microsoft Office Suite.
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy in financial data management.
	Excellent organizational, time-management, and multitasking skills.
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.
	Valid driver's license with practical driving experience.
	Residence within close proximity or reasonable commuting distance to Bode Thomas, Surulere, Lagos State will be an added advantage.
	Willingness to work two (2) Saturdays per month.


Salary
N120,000 - N150,000 monthly

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to: [email protected] using "Administrative Officer – Surulere" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Head of Marketing: Core",
  "description": "International Breweries Plc - Our Dream is to bring people together for a better world. Beer, the original social network, has been bringing people together for thousands of years. We are committed to building great brands that stand the test of time and to brewing the best beers using the finest natural ingredients.

Our diverse portfolio of well over 400 beer brands includes global brands Budweiser, Corona and Stella Artois; multi-country brands Beck&rsquo;s, Castle, Castle Lite, Hoegaarden, and Leffe; and local champions such as Aguila, Bud Light, Jupiler, Klinskoye, Modelo Especial, Quilmes, Skol, and Victoria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head of Marketing: Core

Job Requisition ID: 30098745
Job Location: Nigeria

Summary


	The Key Purpose of this role is to lead the creation and validation of consumer insight driven innovative platforms and solutions that drive profitable top-line growth and the achievement of the company&rsquo;s dream.
	The position holder would drive equity and market share growth of brand.


Key Roles and Responsibilities


	Own and drive sustained brand Volume and equity growth across the portfolio (Volume, awareness, penetration, loyalty, and premiumization).
	Translate brand performance data into decisive actions that deliver both short-term and long-term Commercial results.
	Champion deep consumer, Trade, and market understanding to identify growth opportunities and shape winning strategies.
	Embed data-driven decision-making, leveraging insights to unlock demand and drive commercial impact.
	Lead the development and flawless execution of integrated brand plans aligned to commercial objectives and revenue growth targets.
	Ensure excellence in execution across all consumer touchpoints (Trade, media, digital, retail, and experiential).
	Lead front-end innovation to identify, validate, and scale new growth opportunities.
	Build and sustain a balanced innovation pipeline (short-, mid-, and long-term) that delivers incremental revenue and competitive advantage.
	Drive speed-to-market and success rates of innovations through strong cross-functional alignment.
	Define and evolve differentiated brand positioning, purpose, and core creative platforms that resonate with target audiences.
	Link marketing strategy directly to revenue, profitability, and market share outcomes.
	Track, analyze, and optimize marketing investments to ensure efficient and effective resource allocation.
	Establish clear KPIs and performance dashboards to drive accountability and continuous improvement across Commercial function
	Influence and align senior stakeholders across functions (Sales, Finance, Supply Chain, Insights) to deliver shared business goals.
	Build high-impact, collaborative relationships across the Zone to ensure integrated execution of growth initiatives.
	Coach and develop talent to build a future-ready marketing organization.
	Own and optimize the marketing budget to maximize return on investment and drive efficient growth.
	Balance resource allocation between brand building, demand generation, and innovation priorities.


Minimum Requirements


	Related Degree
	6-8 years of related working experience in brand management, consumer insights and/or marketing strategy consulting environment; consumer goods preferred
	Post graduate degree in business or marketing preferred


Key Attributes and Competencies:


	Established leadership ability at mid / senior level
	Demonstrated ability to manage projects &amp; multidisciplinary teams.
	Proven track record of launched innovation initiatives
	Influencing and consulting skills
	Ability to handle complex situations under pressure
	Passionate, self-starter
	Action and results oriented
	Good written and verbal communication
	Experience in and understanding of Igbo language would be an added advantage.


Additional Information:


	
	Band: V.

        International Breweries Plc - Our Dream is to bring people together for a better world. Beer, the original social network, has been bringing people together for thousands of years. We are committed to building great brands that stand the test of time and to brewing the best beers using the finest natural ingredients.

Our diverse portfolio of well over 400 beer brands includes global brands Budweiser, Corona and Stella Artois; multi-country brands Beck’s, Castle, Castle Lite, Hoegaarden, and Leffe; and local champions such as Aguila, Bud Light, Jupiler, Klinskoye, Modelo Especial, Quilmes, Skol, and Victoria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head of Marketing: Core
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Requisition ID: 30098745
Job Location: Nigeria

Summary


	The Key Purpose of this role is to lead the creation and validation of consumer insight driven innovative platforms and solutions that drive profitable top-line growth and the achievement of the company’s dream.
	The position holder would drive equity and market share growth of brand.


Key Roles and Responsibilities


	Own and drive sustained brand Volume and equity growth across the portfolio (Volume, awareness, penetration, loyalty, and premiumization).
	Translate brand performance data into decisive actions that deliver both short-term and long-term Commercial results.
	Champion deep consumer, Trade, and market understanding to identify growth opportunities and shape winning strategies.
	Embed data-driven decision-making, leveraging insights to unlock demand and drive commercial impact.
	Lead the development and flawless execution of integrated brand plans aligned to commercial objectives and revenue growth targets.
	Ensure excellence in execution across all consumer touchpoints (Trade, media, digital, retail, and experiential).
	Lead front-end innovation to identify, validate, and scale new growth opportunities.
	Build and sustain a balanced innovation pipeline (short-, mid-, and long-term) that delivers incremental revenue and competitive advantage.
	Drive speed-to-market and success rates of innovations through strong cross-functional alignment.
	Define and evolve differentiated brand positioning, purpose, and core creative platforms that resonate with target audiences.
	Link marketing strategy directly to revenue, profitability, and market share outcomes.
	Track, analyze, and optimize marketing investments to ensure efficient and effective resource allocation.
	Establish clear KPIs and performance dashboards to drive accountability and continuous improvement across Commercial function
	Influence and align senior stakeholders across functions (Sales, Finance, Supply Chain, Insights) to deliver shared business goals.
	Build high-impact, collaborative relationships across the Zone to ensure integrated execution of growth initiatives.
	Coach and develop talent to build a future-ready marketing organization.
	Own and optimize the marketing budget to maximize return on investment and drive efficient growth.
	Balance resource allocation between brand building, demand generation, and innovation priorities.


Minimum Requirements


	Related Degree
	6-8 years of related working experience in brand management, consumer insights and/or marketing strategy consulting environment; consumer goods preferred
	Post graduate degree in business or marketing preferred


Key Attributes and Competencies:


	Established leadership ability at mid / senior level
	Demonstrated ability to manage projects & multidisciplinary teams.
	Proven track record of launched innovation initiatives
	Influencing and consulting skills
	Ability to handle complex situations under pressure
	Passionate, self-starter
	Action and results oriented
	Good written and verbal communication
	Experience in and understanding of Igbo language would be an added advantage.


Additional Information:


	
	Band: V.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Compliance Officer",
  "description": "Erisco Foods Limited is an indigenous food product manufacturer, incorporated in Nigeria in 2004 and started operations in 2009, manufacturing Tomato Paste, Seasoning, Rice, Milk cubes and more. We are firmly committed to producing high-quality products that combine nourishment with value pricing, as they strive to become one of Nigeria&rsquo;s largest indigenous foodmanufacturers on a global scale.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Compliance Officer

Job Location: Sokoto
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are hiring a Compliance Officer to strengthen its regulatory and documentation processes.
	This role is ideal for professionals with a solid background in compliance, audit, and statutory reporting.
	The successful candidate will ensure the organization adheres to all relevant laws and internal policies.


Responsibilities


	Conduct internal compliance audits and assist in policy implementation
	Monitoring compliance with company policies and directives
	Monitoring customer acknowledgement
	Monitoring compliance with credit policy, debtors circularisation, recovery of outstanding debts and reconciliation of corporate customers&#39; accounts
	Monitoring the inflation of product prices


Requirements


	B.Sc / HND / OND / Graduate Trainee of Accounting or Management Sciences with 2 or 3 years of experience is an added advantage.
	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Accounting, Business Administration, Law, or a related field
	Strong analytical and documentation skills with close attention to detail
	Excellent communication, interpersonal, and coordination abilities
	Ability to manage multiple compliance tasks across departments.
	The candidate must reside in Sokoto.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment@eriscofoodsltd.com.ng using the Job Position as subject of email (e.g., Compliance Officer - Sokoto).

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

Compliance Officer Job at Erisco Foods Limited




        
    

        
        Erisco Foods Limited is an indigenous food product manufacturer, incorporated in Nigeria in 2004 and started operations in 2009, manufacturing Tomato Paste, Seasoning, Rice, Milk cubes and more. We are firmly committed to producing high-quality products that combine nourishment with value pricing, as they strive to become one of Nigeria’s largest indigenous foodmanufacturers on a global scale.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Compliance Officer

Job Location: Sokoto
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are hiring a Compliance Officer to strengthen its regulatory and documentation processes.
	This role is ideal for professionals with a solid background in compliance, audit, and statutory reporting.
	The successful candidate will ensure the organization adheres to all relevant laws and internal policies.


Responsibilities


	Conduct internal compliance audits and assist in policy implementation
	Monitoring compliance with company policies and directives
	Monitoring customer acknowledgement
	Monitoring compliance with credit policy, debtors circularisation, recovery of outstanding debts and reconciliation of corporate customers' accounts
	Monitoring the inflation of product prices


Requirements


	B.Sc / HND / OND / Graduate Trainee of Accounting or Management Sciences with 2 or 3 years of experience is an added advantage.
	Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Business Administration, Law, or a related field
	Strong analytical and documentation skills with close attention to detail
	Excellent communication, interpersonal, and coordination abilities
	Ability to manage multiple compliance tasks across departments.
	The candidate must reside in Sokoto.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as subject of email (e.g., Compliance Officer - Sokoto).

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
